name: agents-for-EU
description: EU Commission skill plugins — practical tools for European Commission staff covering the full policy, legal, and operational lifecycle.
author: EC-Skills-Library

plugins.name: Legislative & Policy
plugins.description: Policy drafting, legislative procedures, impact assessment, comitology, and inter-service consultation. For policy officers, legislative drafters, and SecGen lawyers.

plugins.name: Competition & Legal Service
plugins.description: Antitrust (Arts. 101–102 TFEU), state aid (Arts. 107–109 TFEU), and Commission Legal Service opinions and litigation. For DG COMP and Legal Service lawyers.

plugins.name: Institutional Management
plugins.description: Unit management, HR administration, financial circuits, and staff operations. For Heads of Unit, Deputy HoUs, HoU assistants, HR managers, and financial officers.

plugins.name: Trade Defence
plugins.description: EU Trade Defence Instruments — anti-dumping, anti-subsidy, safeguards, IPI, and FSR investigations. For DG TRADE trade defence investigators.

plugins.name: Grants, Procurement & Enforcement
plugins.description: Horizon Europe grant management, infringement procedures (Arts. 258–260 TFEU), and public procurement. For grant managers, infringement officers, and procurement experts.

plugins.name: EU Institutional Simulation
plugins.description: Multi-agent simulation of EU institutional processes: Commissioner personas, College deliberation, inter-service consultation, trilogue, and the full Ordinary Legislative Procedure.

plugins.name: Data & Communication
plugins.description: Eurostat data analysis, scoreboard design, press releases, Commissioner speeches, and lines to take. For data analysts and communication officers.
